interests.title: Dance
interests.description: Dancing since elementary school — completely self-taught. I do K-pop, traditional Nepali dances, and trending choreos. Movement has always been my most natural way to express something I can't put into words.

interests.title: Painting
interests.description: A meditative creative outlet — mostly canvas work with acrylics. Painting lets me slow down and process things visually that words can't quite capture.

interests.title: Photography
interests.description: Capturing candid moments and everyday details most people walk past. Mostly shoot on my phone — composition and light matter more than the gear.

interests.title: Songwriting
interests.description: Writing lyrics as a form of journaling — turning feelings into verses. Influenced by a mix of Nepali pop, R&B, and whatever's been on repeat that week.

interests.title: Movies & Dramas
interests.description: Horror is the genre I always come back to. I go deep — behind-the-scenes footage and cast interviews help me understand the story behind the story and how everything was intentionally crafted.
